title: Cookiepack
description: For Settlers and daring Heroes, GloomHollow brings, empire! A modpack that enhances the experience of it's namesake server/gamemode. Embark on a journey into a land unexplored and conquer it's riches!
body:
# The Journey

Embark in the Empires gamemode for Minecraft, set in the untamed land of Arratia under the banner of the Lubris Empire. As a daring settler, you venture forth into the unknown, driven by destiny amidst perilous landscapes!
Join the ranks of settlers and conquerors in Empires, where the fate of Arratia hangs in the balance. Harness your courage, build your legacy, and secure your destiny amidst the dangers of this unexplored land.


# Some of the tech
## Client-side:
- Physics Mod: Experience the rugged terrain of Arratia with realistic block interactions, adding depth to your exploration.

- BSL Shaders: Witness the beauty and danger of Arratia with breathtaking visual enhancements, from towering mountains to dense forests.
 
- Extra Particles: Feel the pulse of Arratia's untamed wilderness with immersive particle effects, heightening the sense of danger and adventure.

## Server-side:
- Towny: Build and fortify settlements as you expand the influence of the Lubris Empire, forging alliances and facing off against rival factions.
  
- TypeWriter: Unravel the mysteries of Arratia through immersive quests and cinematic storytelling, charting your destiny amidst its perilous lands.
  
- Citizens2: Encounter NPCs and dynamic characters who shape the fate of Arratia, from allies aiding your cause to foes challenging your every move.


# Minecraft, Re-baked.
